segment.source: Renders an interactive block: an intro (eyebrow, heading, description) above a draggable range slider whose position highlights the matching volume tier card with volume, price, and included features. Use it for: volume- or usage-tier price tables in source documents ('up to 10,000 requests: $49'), tiered API or metered pricing where readers explore cost by quantity. Prefer 'Pricing Tier Table' for a static per-unit rate table; 'Usage-Based Pricing' for flat pay-as-you-go rate cards.
